summary: Enhanced Activities Management Testing COMPLETE. All new ActivityEditForm features working: 5 tabs (Basic Info, Photos, Timing & Schedule, Tour Details, Supplier & Pricing), operating days toggle with closed days, multiple start times, language selection, inclusions/exclusions/useful_information list editors, photo upload via URL, margin calculation. Backend APIs (9/9 tests passed). Frontend UI fully verified.

tests: test_create_activity_with_all_fields - PASSED (all new fields: useful_information, transfer_type, operating_days, closed_days, start_times, languages)
test_get_activity_by_id_with_all_fields - PASSED (verified all fields persisted correctly)

critical_code_review_comments: ActivityEditForm.jsx is well-structured with 5 tabs matching user requirements
DaysSelector component correctly toggles between operating/closed days with visual feedback
StartTimesEditor properly sorts added times and allows removal
LanguagesEditor uses toggle buttons with 'More...' expansion for additional languages
ActivityImageUploader supports both file upload and URL addition
Margin calculation in Supplier & Pricing tab shows both amount and percentage
Backend ActivityCreate model includes all new fields with proper defaults
Backend migration successfully added new fields to existing activities

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All ActivityEditForm tabs and features working

sample_activities: Desert Safari with BBQ Dinner (Adventure, Dubai)
Burj Khalifa At The Top (Sightseeing, Dubai)
Georgian Wine Tour - Kakheti (Food & Drink, Kakheti)
Baku Old City Walking Tour (Cultural, Baku)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Activities Management fully tested. ActivityEditForm component has 5 tabs (Basic Info, Photos, Timing & Schedule, Tour Details, Supplier & Pricing). Key new features: operating_days toggle with closed_days display, start_times editor with time picker, languages toggle buttons, useful_information/inclusions/exclusions list editors, margin calculation in supplier pricing. Backend endpoints: GET/POST /api/activities, PUT/DELETE /api/activities/{id}, POST /api/uploads/activity-image. Activity cards in list display: start times, languages, closed days, category/transfer badges. Test user: admin@travo.com / admin123. Navigate to Activities Management via: Login -> scroll to footer -> click 'Backend Admin Dashboard' -> click 'Activities Management' tab.
